name: @chbrain/khai-engine-faith
description: khai engine content, the faith domain: faith as position, the persona's standing orientation toward a sacred or transcendent order, distinct from the epistemic work of holding a claim true.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Faith as position: the persona's standing orientation toward a sacred or transcendent order -- the sense of an unseen order and of one's own good in harmonious relation to it, held prior to and apart from any single claim proved or disproved.

card.wire: Attaches at Position. The anchor (position_faith.md) declares faith as a standing orientation toward a sacred or transcendent order -- the sense that such an order exists and that the persona's own good lies in harmonious relation to it -- and the system-wide law makes any persona who holds it carry that orientation beneath every scene it touches.
card.issue: Two ready expressions a persona may hold, the two ways the orientation is lived rather than merely stated: trust (reliance on the unseen order without proof, a leaning weight rather than a leap already taken) and surrender (yielding the will and the claim to control to that order, the leap taken and the grip let go). Each is a full position file the build composes onto the anchor, so the persona gets an orientation that colours how it meets the unproven, not a label. More expressions slot in as sibling files without moving the anchor.
card.require: Two altitudes must hold. One, the law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter ('a persona who holds faith carries this orientation'), so the standing is not invented mid-scene. Two, the link: each persona that holds faith carries it under Projection. A persona may also hold a different, even contradicting, orientation under Shadow -- professed trust over a private, unresolved doubt; the gap is the character, not a flaw to fix.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared, and each persona that holds faith carries an expression under Projection. Whether a Projection faith and a Shadow doubt cohere into a true persona is semantic, so it is taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite. The engine ships its own structural tests; the reading is guided, not gated.
card.setup: Two steps. Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give the persona its faith under Projection: one expression, which carries the anchor upward. Where the persona's public trust masks a private, unresolved pull the other way, put it under Shadow. Read it in how the persona stands toward what it cannot prove; the room reads the standing beneath the plans, never narrates it as an argument won.
